input_snapshot.content:

title: Shipping Notes
description: Keep generated release notes auditable before publish.

# Shipping Notes

Shipping Notes keeps metadata deterministic even when the draft was copied out of chat.

accepted_patch:
--- before
+++ after
@@
 title: Shipping Notes
 description: Keep generated release notes auditable before publish.
 sidebar:
-  order: later
+  order: 999
 legacy_status: current
user_correction: 当 sidebar.order 不是正整数、又没有可靠章节顺序证据时，回退到 999，把它标成待人工排位，而不是硬猜。

validator.result_excerpt: PASS sidebar.order coerced to 999 because the source value was non-numeric.

known_limitation: 999 只是合成 fixture 的保守回退值，不代表真实站点的最终排序。
